/bin/clang-18 -g -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/datachannel-copy-paste-capi-answerer.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/datachannel-copy-paste-capi-answerer.dir/answerer.c.o" -o answerer-capi  -Wl,-rpath,/home/light/work/Video_Prj/QT_Prj/VideoCall/build/Desktop-Debug/third_party/libdatachannel ../../libdatachannel.so.0.24.1
